Features

Intelligence built
for serious traders

Dynamic AI meets on-chain blockchain analysis — so you trade on data, not emotion. No FOMO. No second-guessing. Just edge.

🎯
BlackBox Score (0–100)
Five-dimension composite score with dynamic age-based weighting. A 1-hour token is judged differently than a 30-day veteran. Always contextual, never naive.
⚡
Instant Verdict System
ENTRY, WATCH, or AVOID in under 5 seconds with hard rule caps. Tokens under 30 minutes old are capped at WATCH. No dangerous false confidence.
🧹
Wash Trade Detection
Circular trading fakes volume. We detect same-wallet buy/sell rings and penalize volume quality up to −30 points before you ever see the score.
🔒
LP Lock Verification
Real Solana RPC verification of locked liquidity. PumpFun bonding curves auto-detected. Locked LP adds +15 to +20 pts to your liquidity score.
📋
Auto Trade Plan
Every scan delivers: Buy Zone, Stop Loss, and two Take Profit targets — derived from live on-chain data. Ready to execute immediately.
👁
Smart Watchlist
SQLite-backed persistence, parallel polling, anti-oscillation alerts. You only get notified when 2 consecutive polls confirm a real state change.
The Engine

Five lenses.
One verdict.

Each dimension targets a different failure mode. Together they form a picture no single metric can.

How It Works

Scan. Score. Trade.

Three steps from contract address to confident decision. No wallet. No setup. Just Telegram.

01
/scan command
Paste Any Contract
Send any Solana contract address or DexScreener URL to BlackBox.AI on Telegram. No wallet, no friction, no setup required.
02
< 5 seconds
Get Full Intelligence
BlackBox pulls from DexScreener, Helius RPC, and Birdeye — scores 5 dimensions, detects wash trading, verifies LP lock, and delivers your verdict with trade plan.
03
Always-on alerts
Watch & Stay Ahead
Add to watchlist. BlackBox monitors 24/7 and alerts you the moment verdict changes, dev sells, or LP drains — before the crowd notices.
Smart Alerts

Alerts that matter.
Silence everything else.

Anti-oscillation requires 2 confirmed polls before any alert fires — zero false positives from noisy API data.

Dev wallet sells → immediate alert + reason
LP drops >15% → rug drain warning
WATCH → ENTRY upgrade → buy signal with reason
Volume spike 3× avg → momentum alert
Buyer surge / holder growth → accumulation signal
